mapping.b_element: sub-critical and super-critical flow regimes in shallow-water
hydraulic jump as a shock-like transition
standing and travelling wave behaviors in shallow-water flow

brief_justification: While both papers study wave-like phenomena and shock structures in fluid systems, paper A focuses on MHD equations and conserved quantities in accretion flows, whereas paper B uses a nonlinear wave equation in shallow-water theory with critical flow regimes. The underlying mathematical machinery (MHD vs. shallow-water wave equations) and the physical contexts differ, preventing a direct role-for-role mapping of the core mechanisms.
